title: invoice — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing invoicing surface — customer routes (own-invoice access via invoice.enforce_customer_scope), admin routes (finance workflow), reports (aging/revenue/tax). Platform-admin cross-tenant support routes. Every tenant-plane route carries `entitlement.enforce:invoice_capture` at minimum; credit-note routes additionally carry `entitlement.enforce:credit_note_issuance`. Direct customer-write actions (mark-viewed) are the ONLY write operation permitted to end-users — every other write requires admin+finance role.

groups.name: tenant-invoice-customer
groups.description: Customer-facing invoice access. Auto-scoped by invoice.enforce_customer_scope middleware — only invoices where customer_id = auth.user.id (or one of the athletes they're guardian for) are returned. No writes except mark-viewed.

routes.description: filter[status], filter[from], filter[to]. Default sort: issue_date DESC.
Full detail of one own invoice. Includes lines + payment history + linked credit notes.
Returns a signed S3 URL (7-day TTL) OR streams the PDF inline. Uses signed-URL when Content-Disposition=inline; streams when Content-Disposition=attachment.
Fires InvoiceViewed on first invocation; idempotent on subsequent. Also triggered by the email-tracking pixel with a signed token via a public route (not this one).

groups.name: tenant-invoice-admin
groups.description: Admin+finance invoice CRUD + workflow. finance role + admin role only.

routes.description: Cross-customer list. filter[status], filter[customer_type], filter[customer_id], filter[from], filter[to], filter[series], filter[collection_status], filter[currency], filter[past_due]. Default sort: issue_date DESC.

Body: InvoiceCreateData (customer_type + customer_id + membership_id? + currency + payment_terms + series? + notes?). Freezes billing_address from customer.profile. Consumes 1 unit of invoice_slot_per_month.
Full detail with lines + credit notes + audit trail.
Draft-only. Update notes / internal_notes / payment_terms / shipping_address. Frozen fields (billing_address, currency, invoice_number, issue_date) are refused.
Transition draft → open. Dispatches FinalizeInvoiceJob. Requires every line has tax_calculation_id.
Initial email delivery. Idempotent — refuses if sent_at IS NOT NULL. Use resend for follow-up sends.
Force re-send of the invoice email. Optional body { email_override } to send to a different address.
Body: { void_reason }. Refused when status IN ('paid', 'partially_paid') — issue credit note instead.
Body: { reason_note }. Requires days_past_due >= config('invoice.dunning.uncollectible_after_days').
Body: { payment_method: 'check'|'wire'|'cash'|'other', reference_note, amount_cents, paid_at }. Manual reconciliation for off-platform payments. Creates a transaction row via the transaction module.
Dispatch GenerateInvoicePDFJob for the invoice. Use after tenant branding update or template refresh.
Signed S3 URL to the current PDF.
Ordered by line_number ASC.
Body: InvoiceLineCreateData. Only allowed when parent invoice.status='draft'.
Draft-only. Editable fields: description, quantity, unit_price_cents, item_type, reference_type + reference_id, metadata.
Draft-only. Re-numbers remaining lines + recomputes invoice totals.

groups.name: tenant-invoice-credit-notes
groups.description: Credit note management. Customer sees own via viewMine; admin+finance issue + apply.

routes.description: filter[status], filter[reason], filter[original_invoice_id], filter[from], filter[to]. Customer scope is auto-applied for members without invoice.credit-notes.viewAny (they see only their own via original_invoice.customer_id=auth.user.id).
Body: CreditNoteCreateData (original_invoice_id + amount_cents + reason + reason_note?). Refused when parent invoice.status NOT IN ('paid', 'partially_paid', 'refunded', 'disputed', 'written_off').
Body: { applied_to_type: 'refund'|'next_invoice'|'customer_balance', applied_to_id }. Transitions issued → applied.

groups.name: tenant-invoice-reports
groups.description: Financial reporting surface. Admin + finance role.

routes.description: ?as_of=YYYY-MM-DD (default today). Returns aging buckets: current (not past due), 1-30, 31-60, 61-90, 91+ days past due. Grouped by customer_type + customer_id.
?from=YYYY-MM-DD&to=YYYY-MM-DD&group_by=day|week|month|item_type. Returns invoiced revenue (total_cents on delivered invoices) + collected revenue (amount_paid_cents) + AR balance (amount_due_cents).
?from=YYYY-MM-DD&to=YYYY-MM-DD&group_by=jurisdiction. Returns tax collected per jurisdiction over the period. Feeds VAT / GST / sales-tax return preparation.

groups.name: platform-invoice-support
groups.description: Cross-tenant support tooling. PII redacted by default; unmask requires platform.invoice.pii.view.

routes.description: Cross-tenant list. filter[tenant_id], filter[status], filter[invoice_number], filter[from], filter[to].
?reveal_pii=true requires platform.invoice.pii.view; otherwise billing_address returns { redacted: true } for personal fields.
Aggregated revenue across all tenants. ?from=YYYY-MM-DD&to=YYYY-MM-DD&group_by=tenant|application|currency.
